name: Documentation MCP Server
what_it_does: Documentation MCP server enabling AI agents to search and retrieve documentation from local or remote documentation sources — indexing documentation files, performing semantic search over docs, retrieving relevant documentation sections, and integrating documentation retrieval into agent-driven coding and research workflows.
use_cases: Searching local documentation repositories from coding assistant agents
Retrieving relevant API documentation from development agents
Finding relevant docs sections from technical writing agents
Building documentation-aware coding assistants from development teams
Querying internal company documentation from knowledge agents
Providing accurate documentation context to coding agents
not_for: Real-time web documentation (use web-scout-mcp for live web docs)
Large enterprise documentation systems (designed for local/small-scale use)
best_when: An agent needs to search and retrieve relevant sections from local documentation — for coding assistants with project-specific docs or internal knowledge bases.
avoid_when: You need real-time web documentation retrieval or enterprise-scale doc management — use web search MCPs or dedicated knowledge management systems.

auth.notes: No authentication — local documentation indexing and search. May require embedding API key for semantic search. Configuration for documentation sources in settings.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Local indexing free; embedding API costs if using external embeddings
pricing.paid_tiers: Embedding API costs depend on provider and doc size
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. Embedding provider costs apply for semantic indexing.

performance.rate_limits: Local — no rate limits; search latency depends on index size

known_agent_gotchas: Documentation must be pre-indexed before search — setup step required
Search quality depends on indexing strategy and documentation format
Community MCP from individual developer — limited support
Embedding API key may be required for semantic search quality
Documentation updates require re-indexing — not automatic sync
File format support may be limited (check supported doc types)
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local search. No credentials for MCP itself. Embedding API key needed if used — store securely. Community MCP. Documentation content sent to embedding provider.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local indexing. Embedding API may receive doc content. Community MCP. No credentials for tool itself.
